Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigSellingFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.ScrollBar:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMRIGHT"); self.ScrollBox:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TitleArea, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ScrollBox:SetPoint("BOTTOMRIGHT", self.ScrollBar, "BOTTOMLEFT")
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_TEXT; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, ScrollBarMixin); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CHAT_LOG; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CHAT_LOG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_CHAT_LOG_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_SHOW_BID_PRICE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_SHOW_BID_PRICE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_SHOW_BID_PRICE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_CONFIRM_LOW_PRICE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_CONFIRM_LOW_PRICE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_CONFIRM_LOW_PRICE_TOOLTIP_TEXT_2; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SHOPPING_ALWAYS_LOAD_MORE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GREY_POST_BUTTON; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GREY_POST_BUTTON_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GREY_POST_BUTTON_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_SHOW_SELLING_BAG; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_SHOW_SELLING_BAG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_SHOW_SELLING_BAG_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_COLLAPSED; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_COLLAPSED_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_BAG_COLLAPSED_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_ICON_SIZE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_ICON_SIZE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_ICON_SIZE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_NEXT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_NEXT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_NEXT_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_STACK_REMAINDER; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_STACK_REMAINDER_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_AUTO_SELECT_STACK_REMAINDER_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_RESELECT_ITEM; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_RESELECT_ITEM_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_RESELECT_ITEM_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_MISSING_FAVOURITES; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_MISSING_FAVOURITES_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_MISSING_FAVOURITES_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POSSESSED_FAVOURITES_FIRST; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POSSESSED_FAVOURITES_FIRST_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_POSSESSED_FAVOURITES_FIRST_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)

Mixin(self, ResizeLayoutMixin); self.scrollable = true; self:OnLoad(); self.ShowBidPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AuctionChatLog, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ConfirmPostLowPrice:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ShowBidPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.AlwaysLoadMore:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ConfirmPostLowPrice, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.GreyPostButton:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AlwaysLoadMore, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.BagHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.GreyPostButton, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.BagShown:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BagHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.BagCollapsed:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BagShown, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.IconSize:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BagCollapsed, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, -5); self.AutoSelectNext:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.IconSize, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.AutoSelectStackRemainder:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AutoSelectNext, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ReselectItem:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AutoSelectStackRemainder, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.MissingFavourites:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ReselectItem, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.PossessedFavouritesFirst:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.MissingFavourites, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.UnhideAll:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.PossessedFavouritesFirst, "BOTTOMLEFT", 23, -10)
Mixin(self, ScrollBoxMixin); self:OnLoad()
